name: com.rossogames.rossoforge-ui-popups

samples.description: Contains the base prefab and animator controller used in all popups
Contains the animation assets to give the fade in/out effect when opening and closing the popup
Contains the animation assets to give the size in/out effect when opening and closing the popup
Popup's Template ready to adapt, implements a variant of the base popup. Requires 'Base Popup'
Variant of the base popup that provides a message box with two buttons, OK and Cancel.'
Contains a demonstration of how to use the popup. Requires 'Base Popup', 'Popup Template', and at least one animation sample.

description: A modular UI service for Unity that manages popups with pooling, async/await support, and event-driven lifecycle handling. Provides easy-to-use methods to open, await, and cancel popups, with automatic sorting order.
